caption: The video presents a graphic presentation against a teal and white background. In the upper left, a collection of colorful educational pamphlets and infographics is partially visible, obscured by a white overlay. Beside it, the orange text "¿Cómo pueden contribuir las" appears. As the sequence progresses, the white overlay disappears, fully revealing a collage of various educational documents and digital resources. To the left of this collage, the text expands to read "¿Cómo pueden contribuir las plataformas REA a la mejora del sist". By the final frame, the text is completed, stating "¿Cómo pueden contribuir las plataformas REA a la mejora del sistema educativo y el desarrollo profesion". The collage of infographics remains static on the right side of the screen, featuring a mix of blue, red, and yellow designs with small images and text blocks, while the accompanying orange question grows in length across the white space on the left.
